sections.paragraph:
with suff. פָּעֳלֹו, פָּעָלְךָ (poölcha) more rarely פֹּעֲלֹו Isa 1:31 Jer 22:13 plur. פְּעָלִים 1Ch 11:22, i.q. מַעֲשֶׂה; but (with few exceptions) only in poetry.

(1) a deed, act (That); as of men, Psa 28:4 Pro 24:12, 29 Pro 24:29of God, Psa 64:10 specially an illustrious deed, 2Sa 23:20 an evil deed, Job 36:9 (Arab. فَعَلَةُ id.).

(2) a work (Werk), which any one produces. פֹּעַל יָדַי the work of my hands (i.e. Israel), Isa 45:11. Specially used of divine punishments, Isa 5:12 Hab 1:5 3:2 (compare מַעֲשֶׂה No. 3, a); need of the divine aid, Psa 90:16.

(3) that which is produced by labour, Pro 21:6 wages, Job 7:2 Jer 22:13. Compare פְּעֻלָּה No. 2.
